title: From west to east: How FUCHS LUBRICANTS are moving your world
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - FUCHS LUBRICANTS SOUTH AFRICA is geared to enhance service and product delivery along the Garden Route with its robust distribution network spanning from Belville in the Western Cape to Gqeberha in the Eastern Cape.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - FUCHS LUBRICANTS SOUTH AFRICA is geared to enhance service and product delivery along the Garden Route with its robust distribution network spanning from Belville in the Western Cape to Gqeberha in the Eastern Cape."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"With branches strategically positioned to better serve the agriculture, automotive, industrial and manufacturing sectors across the Cape, this network underscores FUCHS’ commitment to providing localised support and high-performance lubrication solutions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tailored solutions for diverse industriesOur comprehensive range of products offer a one-stop solution that meets machine lubrication needs with technology, convenience, reliability, sustainability and cost saving in mind. Each FUCHS branch is fully equipped to meet the demanding needs of the Western and Eastern Cape’s diverse and dynamic sectors.","html":"Tailored solutions for diverse industries
Our comprehensive range of products offer a one-stop solution that meets machine lubrication needs with technology, convenience, reliability, sustainability and cost saving in mind. Each FUCHS branch is fully equipped to meet the demanding needs of the Western and Eastern Cape’s diverse and dynamic sectors."},{"type":"list","items":["Agriculture: Reliable products for tractors, harvesters and other farming machinery.","Automotive: Solutions for everything from personal vehicles to major fleets and service centres.","Industrial: High-tech lubricants for manufacturing and engineering applications.","Specialty products: Including marine applications, mining, wind, food-grade and biodegradable ranges."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A commitment to customer success“At FUCHS, we believe in more than just providing products; we strive to be partners in our customers’ success,” says the sales director, Andrew Cowling. “Our knowledgeable team is ready to offer hands-on technical support and expert guidance to help businesses reduce downtime and improve operational efficiency.”","html":"A commitment to customer success
“At FUCHS, we believe in more than just providing products; we strive to be partners in our customers’ success,” says the sales director, Andrew Cowling. “Our knowledgeable team is ready to offer hands-on technical support and expert guidance to help businesses reduce downtime and improve operational efficiency.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Moving your worldWhether you’re operating a coastal workshop, managing an inland factory, or farming in the rural expanses of the province, FUCHS is committed to being a trusted partner, keeping your world moving.","html":"Moving your world
Whether you’re operating a coastal workshop, managing an inland factory, or farming in the rural expanses of the province, FUCHS is committed to being a trusted partner, keeping your world moving."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"For inquiries or to place orders, connect with FUCHS LUBRICANTS SOUTH AFRICA on 041 451 1586 or [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For news on products, promotions and special offers, follow on Instagram, Facebook and LinkedIn, or visit https://www.fuchs.com/za/en.","html":"For news on products, promotions and special offers, follow on Instagram, Facebook and LinkedIn, or visit https://www.fuchs.com/za/en."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
